ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transit_data_sets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the dataset being analyzed */,
  "total_pass_count" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers recorded */,
  "total_waiting_time" REAL /* Total waiting time experienced by passengers */,
  "total_in_vehicle_time" REAL /* Total in-vehicle time for all trips */,
  "total_travel_time" REAL /* Total travel time recorded for all trips */,
  "travel_time_per_passenger" REAL /* Average travel time per passenger */,
  "total_vehicle_kms" REAL /* Total kilometers traveled by vehicles */,
  "dataset_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  "dataset_time" TEXT /* Time when the dataset was collected */,
  "peak_hour_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the dataset was collected during peak hours */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., GPS, manual input, sensors) */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset for tracking updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_statistics" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the passenger data belongs to */,
  "total_city_travelers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers traveling to the city */,
  "total_terminal_travelers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers traveling to terminals */,
  "avg_travel_time_to_city" REAL /* Average travel time to the city */,
  "avg_travel_time_to_terminal" REAL /* Average travel time to the terminal */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "travel_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the travel (e.g., work, leisure, shopping) */,
  "travel_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of travel (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Passenger satisfaction rating (on a scale of 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_statistics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES transit_data_sets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_time_metrics" (
  "travel_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel time metric entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the travel metrics belong to */,
  "waiting_time_city_travel" REAL /* Total waiting time for city travel */,
  "in_vehicle_time_city_travel" REAL /* Total in-vehicle time for city travel */,
  "waiting_time_terminal_travel" REAL /* Total waiting time for terminal travel */,
  "in_vehicle_time_terminal_travel" REAL /* Total in-vehicle time for terminal travel */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the travel time was recorded */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day the travel time was recorded */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the travel time (e.g., sunny, rainy, snowy) */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the travel time (e.g., heavy, moderate, light) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_time_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES transit_data_sets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_usage" (
  "vehicle_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle usage entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the vehicle usage data belongs to */,
  "total_vehicle_kms" REAL /* Total kilometers traveled by vehicles */,
  "total_passenger_kms" REAL /* Total passenger kilometers traveled */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., bus, train, tram) */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the vehicle */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the vehicle */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the vehicle (e.g., good, needs repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES transit_data_sets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_overview" (
  "overview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overview entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the overview refers to */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the dataset analysis results */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was analyzed */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time when the dataset was analyzed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analysis (e.g., statistical methods, machine learning) */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_overview_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES transit_data_sets ("dataset_id")
)
